title: Charred Tlayudas with Creamy Salsa
description: A twist on traditional Mexican tlayudas, topped with a creamy salsa and crispy tortillas.
instructions: Preheat grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Grill the tlayudas for 2-3 minutes per side, until crispy.
In a pan, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook for 3-4 minutes, until softened.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add the charred corn and cook for 1-2 minutes, until heated through.
Stir in the creamy salsa and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Spoon the corn mixture onto the grilled tlayudas.
Top with chopped cilantro and crumbled queso fresco.
